case_title: SIVAKUMAR MANJUNATH VS. HAP S. CHOHAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.(506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $88.50) SERVED SEP-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOHAN, HAP S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANJUNATH, SIVAKUMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOHAN, HAP S. $788.65 PRINCIPAL, $138.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $927.15, THIS AWARD ASSUMES THAT PLAINTIFFS WILL RETAIN AND CASH DEFENDANTS CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $483.72 WHICH REPRESENTS PARTIAL PAYMENT OF THE AMOUNT OWED TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: NOVEMBER, 06, 2008).
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT CHOHAN, HAP S.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.
